articles.title: Watch full highlights as England come from behind to beat DR Congo
articles.description: Harry Kane scores twice as England come from behind to beat DR Congo in a tense World Cup encounter in Atlanta, and set up a last-16 meeting with Mexico.

articles.title: Badenoch accuses Starmer of leaving defence spending 'mess' for Burnham
articles.description: Conservative leader Kemi Badenoch criticised what she called a missing £5bn in the defence investment plan.

articles.title: Is Burnham facing a £5bn defence 'black hole'?
articles.description: BBC Verify investigates whether a shortfall in funding for the government's defence investment plan is a "black hole".

articles.title: England's warmest June on record following historic heatwave
articles.description: England saw its warmest June since records began in 1865 and the second warmest for the whole of the UK according to data just released by the Met Office.
